findings_details.title: staging twingate_token_api_arn points to development secret path
findings_details.body: Line 10: twingate_token_api_arn = 'arn:aws:secretsmanager:us-west-2:479061657325:secret:development/arqu/twingate_token_api-0JPjt9'. The path segment 'development/arqu/' will cause staging Terraform runs to pull the dev Twingate token, not the staging one. Compare new-dev.tfvars line 10 (identical path) and new-prod.tfvars line 10 (also identical path). Fix: change the secret path to staging/arqu/twingate_token_api-<suffix> (verify correct ARN in Secrets Manager).

findings_details.title: production twingate_token_api_arn points to development secret path
findings_details.body: Line 10: twingate_token_api_arn = 'arn:aws:secretsmanager:us-west-2:479061657325:secret:development/arqu/twingate_token_api-0JPjt9'. Production is using the dev environment Twingate token. Fix: change to production/arqu/twingate_token_api-<suffix> (verify correct ARN in Secrets Manager).

findings_details.title: terraform apply example uses wrong plan path (missing new- prefix)
findings_details.body: Line 161: 'terraform apply tmp/${STAGE}.plan'. The plan is written to 'tmp/new-${STAGE}.plan' (see Makefile line 10 and the plan command on line 150). The apply example is missing the 'new-' prefix, so copying it literally will fail with 'no such file'. Fix: change to 'terraform apply tmp/new-${STAGE}.plan'.

findings_details.title: set -e only: missing set -u and set -o pipefail
findings_details.body: Line 6: 'set -e'. The CLAUDE.md bin/ script conventions require 'set -euo pipefail'. Missing -u means unset variable references silently expand to empty string (e.g. a typo in WORKSPACE, APP_ID, REGION). Missing -o pipefail means a failed aws command piped to echo on line 88 would be swallowed. Fix: change to 'set -euo pipefail'.

findings_details.title: Unquoted variable in terraform workspace select
findings_details.body: Line 112: 'terraform workspace select $WORKSPACE || terraform workspace new $WORKSPACE'. $WORKSPACE is validated to be one of two known values so word-splitting cannot cause harm here, but the CLAUDE.md convention for bin/ scripts is to quote all variable expansions. The Makefile (line 24) does the same unquoted — however this script added it independently. Fix: quote as '"$WORKSPACE"' in both positions on line 112.

findings_details.title: hashicorp/setup-terraform pinned to outdated v2
findings_details.body: Line 73 (and terraform_plan_ci_prod.yaml line 53): 'uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v2'. The current latest release is v3. CLAUDE.md requires bumping any outdated action version when touching the file. Fix: change to 'hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3' in both workflow files. Verify: gh api repos/hashicorp/setup-terraform/releases/latest --jq .tag_name

findings_details.title: Inconsistent plan output filenames between dev/stg and prod workflows
findings_details.body: dev/stg workflow (line 101): plan saved to 'tmp/new-${{ matrix.environment }}' (no .plan extension). prod workflow (line 75): plan saved to 'tmp/new-${{ env.STAGE }}.plan' (has .plan extension). The show command on line 109 (dev/stg) and line 81 (prod) must match their respective plan paths and they do, so it works — but the inconsistency is a maintenance hazard. Fix: add the .plan extension to the dev/stg plan-out path for consistency: '-out tmp/new-${{ matrix.environment }}.plan' and update the show command on line 109 accordingly.
